scripts.dev: bash -lc "npm run web:dev & npm run api:dev & wait"
scripts.android:sync: npm run build -w apps/web && bash -lc 'cd apps/mobile && npx cap sync android'
scripts.android:open: bash -lc 'cd apps/mobile && npx cap open android'
scripts.android:dev: npm run android:sync && npm run android:open
scripts.android:build: npm run android:sync && echo 'Open Android Studio via npm run android:open, then Build > Build Bundle(s) / APK(s) > Build APK(s) or Build Bundle(s). For release AAB, use Build > Generate Signed Bundle / APK.'
